purpose: Decompose carry returns to reveal hidden factor exposures and assess genuine diversification value for specific investor portfolios
components: Portfolio-specific assessment based on existing factor exposures
current_assessment: Most practically consequential insight for portfolio construction. For USD-based investors already overweight equities and credit, carry is redundant. For non-USD investors (GPIF, Norwegian SWF), carry may genuinely diversify via negative dollar beta.
limitations: Factor loading estimates lack confidence intervals
No regime conditioning on factor loadings
Ecological fallacy: conclusion is portfolio-specific, not universal
Time-varying dollar beta not formally modeled
